champion.dominant_term: T_execute (DiT base pass 267:215 = 97.7%) — VRAM offload, NOT software-bound
champion.noise_band: N=1 cold (AP2 gap); warm path pathological (model can't reside in 24GB)

target: Reduce T_execute by making the 22B model RESIDENT in 24GB (eliminate offload). Lead: GGUF Q4 ~16GB.
gate: promote only on benchmarked cold T_execute beating 1047.9s outside noise AND quality-pass vs fp16 champion (Joe's eye).
out_of_software_scope: T_execute is model/VRAM-bound, not Comfy-Cozy code. Agent dispatch already <0.2%.
